defaultMissionText: I need two AA batteries delivered to my East Village office. Show the courier's true gross hourly rate.
missionExamples: I need two AA batteries delivered to my East Village office. Show the courier's true gross hourly rate.
Deliver one phone charger to the East Village office and include all working time.
Bring two AA batteries to the Greenpoint apartment and calculate the courier's gross rate.
Deliver one umbrella to the East Village office and count the full trip.
Bring one phone charger to the Greenpoint apartment and show excluded time.
